repos.name: apple/container
repos.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
repos.descriptionZh: 一种在 Mac 上使用轻量级虚拟机创建和运行 Linux 容器的工具。它是用 Swift 编写的，并针对 Apple 芯片进行了优化。

repos.name: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
repos.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
repos.descriptionZh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——以毫秒为单位的平均存储库。 158 种语言，亚毫秒级查询，标记减少 99%。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖性。

repos.name: calesthio/OpenMontage
repos.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
repos.descriptionZh: 世界上第一个开源的代理视频制作系统。 12条管道、52种工具、500+座席技能。将您的人工智能编码助手变成一个完整的视频制作工作室。

repos.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
repos.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
repos.descriptionZh: 让您的人工智能代理有一双能够看到整个互联网的眼睛。阅读和搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书 — 一个 CLI，零 API 费用。

repos.name: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
repos.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
repos.descriptionZh: AI 代理技能可研究 Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket 和网络上的任何主题，然后综合得出有根据的摘要

repos.name: iptv-org/iptv
repos.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
repos.descriptionZh: 来自世界各地的公开 IPTV 频道集合

repos.name: phuryn/pm-skills
repos.description: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth.
repos.descriptionZh: PM 技能市场：100 多种代理技能、命令和插件 - 从发现到策略、执行、启动和增长。

repos.name: lfnovo/open-notebook
repos.description: An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features
repos.descriptionZh: Notebook LM 的开源实现，具有更多灵活性和功能

repos.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
repos.descriptionZh: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 利用AI LLM一键生成短视频。

repos.name: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
repos.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop
repos.descriptionZh: 品味技能 - 给你的人工智能良好的品味。阻止人工智能产生无聊的、通用的斜坡

repos.name: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
repos.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!
repos.descriptionZh: SimpleX - 第一个无需任何类型的用户标识符即可运行的消息传递网络 - 设计为 100% 私密！ iOS、Android 和桌面应用程序📱！

repos.name: openai/plugins
repos.description: OpenAI Plugins
repos.descriptionZh: OpenAI 插件

repos.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
repos.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
repos.descriptionZh: 从 Anthropic 中提取的系统提示 - Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、Claude Code、Claude Design。 OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 思维、GPT 5.5 即时、Codex。 Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash、3.1 Pro、反重力。 xAI - Grok、Cursor、Copilot、VS Code、Perplexity 等。定期更新。

repos.name: microsoft/markitdown
repos.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
repos.descriptionZh: 用于将文件和 Office 文档转换为 Markdown 的 Python 工具。

repos.name: stablyai/orca
repos.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
repos.descriptionZh: Orca 是与一组并行代理一起工作的 ADE。使用您自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。可在桌面和移动设备上使用。

repos.name: ogulcancelik/herdr
repos.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
repos.descriptionZh: 位于您终端中的代理多路复用器。

repos.name: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
repos.description: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0
repos.descriptionZh: AI 代理的 817 项结构化网络安全技能 · 映射到 6 个框架：MITRE ATT&CK、NIST CSF 2.0、MITRE ATLAS、D3FEND、NIST AI RMF 和 MITRE F3（打击欺诈） · Agentskills.io 标准 · 可与 Claude Code、GitHub Copilot、Codex CLI、Cursor、Gemini CLI 和 20 多个平台配合使用 · 29 个安全域 · Apache 2.0

repos.name: tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
repos.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that stacks the free tiers of 16 LLM providers (~1.7B tokens/month) behind one /v1 endpoint — plus any custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Smart routing, automatic failover, encrypted keys. Personal experimentation only.
repos.descriptionZh: OpenAI 兼容代理，将 16 个 LLM 提供商的免费层（约 1.7B 代币/月）堆叠在一个 /v1 端点后面 - 以及任何自定义 OpenAI 兼容端点。智能路由、自动故障转移、加密密钥。仅个人实验。

repos.name: can1357/oh-my-pi
repos.description: ⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more
repos.descriptionZh: ⌥ 终端的 AI 编码代理 — 哈希锚定编辑、优化工具工具、LSP、Python、浏览器、子代理等

repos.name: Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
repos.description: Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face running locally across platforms
repos.descriptionZh: 通过免提语音交互、语音中断和跨平台本地运行的 Live2D 面部识别功能与任何法学硕士交谈
